name: agent-notifier
description: Encrypted phone notifications and lightweight approvals for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Send meaningful encrypted alerts from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Agent Notifier lets Codex use a local MCP server to send encrypted phone notifications, request short replies, and request lightweight approvals without giving the hosted service plaintext message content or sender private keys.
defaultPrompt: Set up Agent Notifier phone notifications.
Notify me when this task is done or blocked.
Ask for approval before the release step.
